summary: Added a Cloudflare-specific adapter that authorizes every already-verified signing-key fingerprint only for the exact MirrorCartographer repository, Cloudflare deployment workflow path, git ref, and cloudflare.deployment-proof claim class.

verification.method: isolated Node test using byte-identical module logic and equivalent test cases
cases: exact repository/workflow/ref/claim and all fingerprints authorized
partially authorized signer set rejected as a whole

privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, synthetic fingerprints, abstract policy metadata, and commit identifiers only. No secret values, private chat, personal identifiers, or health material.
limits: Does not verify signatures or derive fingerprints from GitHub artifact-attestation output.
Does not derive repository, workflow, or ref from an authenticated certificate or OIDC identity.
Not yet wired into the deployment workflow acceptance gate.
Cloudflare deployment remains blocked by external environment configuration; no resolving deployment URL is claimed.
falsification_route: Run the committed test file, then wire normalized verified fingerprints and authenticated workflow identity into the adapter and demonstrate that any unauthorized fingerprint or scope mismatch makes deployment acceptance fail.
